description: Request body for creating an order after Razorpay payment

razorpay_order_example.notes: Payment completed via Razorpay - Payment ID: pay_1234567890abcdef, Order ID: order_1234567890abcdef

razorpay_order_with_full_details.notes: Payment ID: pay_ABC123XYZ, Razorpay Order ID: order_DEF456UVW, Amount: ₹5000, Transaction completed at 2024-01-15 14:30:00

field_descriptions.userId: MongoDB ObjectId of the user - must be valid and exist in database
field_descriptions.cartId: MongoDB ObjectId of the cart - must belong to userId and contain products

address.phoneNumber: Optional - Will use user's phoneNumber if not provided

field_descriptions.notes: Optional - Recommended to include Razorpay payment details for reference

notes_suggestions: Payment completed via Razorpay - Payment ID: {paymentId}, Order ID: {orderId}
Payment ID: {paymentId}, Razorpay Order ID: {orderId}, Amount: ₹{amount}
